_note: N/A — PostInstallHUB has no design system or design tokens.
_reason: PostInstallHUB is a terminal script collection. The only visual system is ANSI color codes defined in lib/colors.sh: RED, GREEN, YELLOW, BLUE, NC. There are no UI components, color palettes, typography scales, or spacing systems.
_see: lib/colors.sh for the actual terminal color definitions.
